CustomField.description: Overrides the org-level Donation Matching Implementing Class for this batch. Specifies an optional Apex class that implements BDI_IMatching to provide custom donation matching logic. The class must implement the BDI_IMatching interface.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the fully qualified Apex class name for custom donation matching in this batch. Leave blank to use standard matching logic.
CustomField.label: Donation Matching Implementing Class
